user_task_description: Update only the returned submittal rows with the new revision status and resubmit date.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Update only the returned submittal rows with the new revision status and resubmit date, insert a `Late Days` formula column immediately after `Due Date`, and highlight rejected rows in the requested color while preserving filters and existing formulas.
atomic_scope: Only the two live sheets, both template sheets, the dashboard formulas, workbook names, and highlighted late rows are required.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx artifact that completes the requested cross-document document operation.

notes.Task Notes:
- Keep the template sheets unchanged
- Do not flatten the workbook into plain cells
